title: anoectochilus uniflorus
intro: Anoectochilus uniflorus, also known as the single-flowered orchid or one-flowered pygmy orchid, is a type of orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots, which contain bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of A. uniflorus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valued herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. A. uniflorus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine preparations, such as capsules or infusions.
